summary: Iteration 92 testing complete. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend accessibility and mobile responsiveness tests passed. Component splitting verified for KidsCheckinAdmin (imports CheckedInTab, CheckInTab, CheckOutTab) and CheckInSetupPage (imports CheckInReportsTab). WCAG AA accessibility attributes verified: skip-to-main link, sidebar toggle aria-label/aria-expanded, main content id='main-content' role='main', nav role='navigation'. Mobile responsiveness working: hamburger menu visible on landing page, bottom nav on admin dashboard.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 92 features verified working. Person_ID cross-referencing in transactions API returns real person names (>50% have real names). Component splitting verified: KidsCheckinAdmin (673 lines) imports CheckedInTab, CheckInTab, CheckOutTab from ./kids/. CheckInSetupPage (646 lines) imports CheckInReportsTab. WCAG AA accessibility: AppShell has skip-to-main link (data-testid='skip-to-main'), sidebar toggle has aria-label and aria-expanded, main content has id='main-content' and role='main', nav has role='navigation' and aria-label='Main navigation'. Mobile responsiveness: Landing page hamburger menu visible at 390x844, admin dashboard uses bottom nav instead of sidebar on mobile.

person_id_cross_referencing.details: GET /api/platform/transactions returns transactions with real person names (>50% have real names)

component_splitting_kids_checkin.details: KidsCheckinAdmin imports and renders CheckedInTab, CheckInTab, CheckOutTab from ./kids/

component_splitting_checkin_setup.details: CheckInSetupPage imports and renders CheckInReportsTab from ./kids/

accessibility_skip_to_main.details: AppShell has skip-to-main link with data-testid='skip-to-main'

accessibility_sidebar_toggle.details: Sidebar toggle has aria-label='Collapse sidebar' and aria-expanded='true'

accessibility_main_content.details: Main content has id='main-content' and role='main'

accessibility_nav.details: Nav has role='navigation' and aria-label='Main navigation'

accessibility_login_inputs.details: Email input has aria-label='Email address', password input has aria-label='Password'

mobile_landing_page.details: Hamburger menu visible at 390x844 viewport, KPI grid stacks properly

mobile_admin_sidebar.details: Bottom nav visible on mobile, sidebar replaced with mobile navigation

regression_platform_dashboard.details: Platform stats loads with 8 churches, 109,900 members

mocked_apis.solomon_pay: Solomon Pay processor is MOCKED for demo mode
